ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the team participated in the competition */,
  "university" TEXT /* University or institution the team is associated with */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is located */,
  "team_leader_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the team leader */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was registered */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team undertaking the project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the document belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who uploaded the document */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wiki_links" (
  "wiki_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wiki link */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the wiki link belongs to */,
  "wiki_link" TEXT /* Link to the team wiki */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the wiki link was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wiki_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wiki_links_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team leader, member, judge) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "judging_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each judging criteria */,
  "criteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the judging criteria */,
  "criteria_description" TEXT /* Description of the judging criteria */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the criteria in the overall score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team being scored */,
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judging criteria being used */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given by the judge */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the judge who gave the score */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the score was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_criteria_id FOREIGN KEY ("criteria_id") REFERENCES judging_criteria ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team receiving the feedback */,
  "judge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the judge giving the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_judge_id FOREIGN KEY ("judge_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "statistic_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistic was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistic was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id")
)
